title: Clown & Out
overview: Paco Saavedra is a struggling comedian whose life flips overnight when a livestreamed scuffle with a gangster goes viral. Suddenly, he’s a national hero, a meme, and the internet’s newest obsession. But fame is a double-edged sword. As Paco is thrust into instant stardom, he battles to separate his true identity from the clown persona the world demands — even if it costs him the woman he loves.
